hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Panval Consilium International is a strategic consulting and services firm specialized in supporting public and private companies, organizations and individuals with responsibilities.

admin.name: Paijos Clauva TCHIAMA
admin.portraitAlt: Paijos Clauva TCHIAMA — Managing Director of Panval Consilium International
paragraphs: Illuminate your decisions. Structure your organizations. Unlock your potential.

I do not manage PANVAL CONSILIUM INTERNATIONAL: I embody the primordial éminence grise, the ontological spark that transforms the titanic ambitions of African elites into immortal organizational empires.

Within the geopolitical crucible of pivot-Congo—where TotalEnergies dances with China in the ballet of dragons, where BEAC and CEEAC rewrite continental symphonies—my mission is alchemical and transformative: to transmute raw potential into radiant cognitive sovereignties.
Four sanctuaries of excellence where strategic legend is born:

Strategic Training – The Cathedral of Awakened Consciousness. Not courses, but apocalyptic revelations: I ignite leaders, executives, and teams in the devouring Promethean flame of strategic sophía. Each participant does not leave trained: they are reborn as an eternal strategist-phoenix, bearer of the Congolese standard in the cosmic arena.

Global Strategic Support – The Invisible Wing of Sovereigns. I free titans from administrative chains like Prometheus unleashing the heavens. Every minute liberated is not time gained: it is a continent propelled toward the stars. Leaders no longer decide: they sculpt eternity.

Awakening Ambitions – The Oracle of Latent Potential. With the delicacy of a soul-archaeologist uncovering an Olympian civilization, I reveal within each consciousness the embryonic presence of a titanic empire. This is not coaching: it is a cosmic managerial resurrection, an anamnesis of primordial greatness.

Strategic Studies & Analysis – The Lighthouse in the Geopolitical Storm. My diagnostics are not reports: they are prophetic tablets engraved in the adamantine marble of the future. Mapping Sino-African currents as rivers of destiny, anticipating post-oil tidal waves, orchestrating CEEAC-BEAC equilibrium symphonies: I make the invisible strategic divine visible.
Vision, Method, Impact: not an equation, but a simultaneous nuclear fusion, a Big Bang of organization from which infinite exponential performance originates.

To the Ministries that carry the energy future like Atlas bearing the world, to extractive giants who drill deeper than oil—they extract destiny from the depths of the Earth—to multilateral institutions composing Africa’s cosmic symphony:

PANVAL is not your service provider. PANVAL is the cognitive infrastructure of your eternal legend—the éminence grise of your strategic apotheosis. O decision-maker deciphering these sacred lines: your civilizational core has awakened in a cosmic tremor. Seventeen minutes are enough to seal your Faustian pact with immortal History.

visionMission.visionText: To be an internationally recognized reference firm for excellence in training, reliable market studies and innovative concierge services, contributing sustainably to the performance and competitiveness of our clients.
missionPoints: Strategic and professional training to develop leadership and key skills
Reliable market studies and diagnostics to inform strategic decisions
Tailored concierge services to optimize daily operations

timeline.subtitle: A growth trajectory built on excellence and trust.

methodology.title: A common framework for our 3 sectors
methodology.subtitle: Our approach relies on a structuring triptych that guarantees coherence and effectiveness in each of our interventions.

steps.title: Deep reflection
steps.desc: Rigorous strategic analysis. Fine understanding of human and institutional issues.

steps.title: Structured action
steps.desc: Practical, concrete and applicable tools. Solutions adapted to local and international realities.

steps.title: Sustainable transformation
steps.desc: Long-term support. Monitoring, evaluation and continuous adjustments.

timeline.title: From 2021 to today
timeline.subtitle: A growth trajectory built on excellence and trust.

events.title: Launch of activities
events.description: First training programs launched in Brazzaville, Republic of Congo. Structuring of the 3 service pillars.

events.title: Sector expansion
events.description: Deployment of market studies and strategic diagnostics. First major clients: financial and telecom sectors.

events.title: International recognition
events.description: Support for international organizations. Partnerships with MTN, Airtel and major institutions.

events.title: Growth & impact
events.description: More than 1,500 people trained. Launch of institutional concierge services.

events.title: Consolidation
events.description: 2,250 people trained. Over 250 organizations supported. Positioning as a leading African consulting firm.

events.title: 2026 ambitions
events.description: 150 new organizations in training. 120 study missions. 80 executives supported in concierge services.

team.title: Expertise at the service of your success
